title: Martin Showers Smith& McDonald ransomware incident

extortion.description: Martin, Showers, Smith McDonald, LLC is a law firm specializing in civil litigation, trial law, personal injury, and family law.We are ready to upload more than 8 GB of documents. More than half of the data are scans of client personal documents (passports, SSNs, death/birth certificates, DLs and more), employee information, confidential documents, court reports.
